- [54, 49]
- [57, 16]

Actually, wait. Let me reconsider the game mechanics. In Level 1, I clicked a cursor (white cross) and then clicked gray dots along a path. The cursor moved along the path to the blue blob.
In Level 2, maybe the mechanic is similar. The sky blue dots are path markers, and I need to click them in the correct order. When I click a sky blue dot, it turns into a magenta square. But clicking the blue blob seems to validate the path - incorrect dots disappear.
Now that I have the correct 4 magenta squares, maybe I need to click the blue blob again to complete the level.
But wait, I already clicked the blue blob once and it removed the incorrect dots. Maybe I need to click it again to confirm the correct path.
Let me try clicking the blue blob again.
